mapper.sql: select a.id, a.serial_number, a.production_completion_id, e.plan_number, b.odd_numbers, c.job_name, f.production_line, b.batch_number, g.material_name, d.manufacture_date, h.check_item, c.quantity, a.standards_id, a.sample_quantity, a.inspection_value, h.up_limit, h.lower_limit, a.result, a.check_user_id, i.user_name as check_user_name, a.inspector_time, a.remark from mes_product_inspector a
mapper.select: left join mes_production_completion b on a.production_completion_id = b.id left join mes_job_assembly c on b.job_id = c.id left join mes_planned_production d on c.planned_production_id = d.id left join mes_production_plan e on d.production_plan_id = e.id left join mes_factory f on d.factory_id = f.id left join wms_material g on b.material_id = g.id left join mes_inspection_standards h on a.standards_id = h.id left join sys_user i on a.check_user_id = i.user_id where a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into mes_product_inspector
serial_number, production_completion_id, standards_id, sample_quantity, inspection_value, result, check_user_id, inspector_time, remark,
#{serialNumber}, #{productionCompletionId}, #{standardsId}, #{sampleQuantity}, #{inspectionValue}, #{result}, #{checkUserId}, #{inspectorTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from mes_product_inspector where id in
#{id}
